title: An Ordinance Mandating the Use of Face Mask in Public Places During the Implementation of the Enhanced Community Quarantine Due to Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) in the Municipality of Los Baños. (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Josephine S. Evangelista, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Arlene P. Delos Santos and Jozylyn N. Manansala, 03/30/2020)
